reviews.title: No next time 没有下次
reviews.text: If you are travelling with toddler, give this a pass. The room is spacious but too many sharp edges, which in fact, my 2yo got a hit on her head into the marble wall. The breakfast at Social is aweful (see photos). Same menu during my 3-day stay. The options are very limited. Their high chair is dirty. Pastry tasted “overnight”, undercooked scrambled egg, dried hashbrown, tasteless green bean soup.
reviews.response:
Dear Wai,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are sorry to hear that your stay did not meet expectations, particularly regarding your room experience and breakfast at Social.

Please rest assured that your comments regarding safety, cleanliness and food quality have been shared with the relevant teams for review and improvement.

We appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again for a better experience.

Sincerely,
Matthieu Bertho
General Manager
The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan
reviews.room_type: Premier Deluxe Room, Guest room, 1 King, City view, Corner room, High floor

reviews.title: Only the room is good
reviews.positives: Bed
reviews.negatives: The breakfast was horrible and the hotel was under renovation everything other than the room was a mess

reviews.title: Nice hotel but some things don’t function
reviews.text:
We stayed 5 nights at St Regis in Shanghai. First night, our room’s lights couldn’t turn off. Electrician came to fix them and told us not to turn them on again or else we can’t turn them off and he would need to come fix it again… 
Second day they finally fixed the lights. 
Sauna didn’t work in men’s locker room ton our first day of stay. On the second day sauna in women’s spa didn’t work… 
On our fourth day they forgot to come clean our room… 

We had quite a lot of inconveniences happen to us in a span of a few days. I would expect a little bit more from a hotel like this.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, Guest room, 2 Double, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.positives: Location is good, close to Nanjing Rd and Kerry Centre and don't get me wrong when you read my don't likes written below the hotel certainly had class 10 years ago but for a 5-star there are a many things you would not expect.
reviews.negatives:
A hotel that is part of such a prestigious group should pay much more attention to detail. Many things simply did not meet the standards of a five-star hotel, especially at this price point:
- Lobby: The hall was drafty and cold.
- Check-in: You sit so low that it feels like sinking into a hole, and you have to look up awkwardly to see the staff.
- Lift: Poorly programmed, with long waiting times. The diamond-shaped buttons glitter so much you can’t read the numbers—they look more suited to a Christmas tree than a lift.
- Suite: The furniture was dated, and cabinet doors did not close properly. The room clearly needs some care.
- Coffee maker: Built-in and unnecessarily complicated—felt like you needed a degree to operate it.
- Phone: Numbers were so tiny they were unreadable. When I finally managed to dial reception or in-room dining, no one answered.
I travel frequently and stay in five-star hotels around the world, so I have a good sense of what works and what doesn’t. Unfortunately, the St. Regis Shanghai fell short.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I thought the hotel itself is beautiful but honestly, I was very surprised with the service. A lot of people(even at the front desk) couldn’t speak English very well. And there were little things like I would ask for a taxi and they would just write the address on a card but wouldn’t tell the taxi driver where to go. Like I said beautiful hotel but maybe its just the fact that the service in Shanghai is not very good. Overall it’s not bad.
reviews.response:
Dear Kamilia,

Thank you for choosing to stay at The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan and sharing your review with us. Your comments are very important to us. Your feedback has been shared with Management Team and we will further enhance the products and training. We are sorry for any inconvenience may bring you, and hope to welcome you back when you visit Shanghai next time.

Best Regards,
Hotel Management Team

reviews.title: clean and modern hotel decor with attentive staff
reviews.text:
the hotel decoration is superb and clean.
The food is excellent (Chinese restaurant)
Staff are very attentive. The only strange aspect is that when we check in they ask to charge the deposit, then when we check out, they told us they are going to deduct what we've used in the hotel from the deposit then they will return the rest of money to us again.
From my experience, the hotel always give you deposit back right away, and then charge what you use at the hotel on another separate bill.
If we were to follow the first process, we wouldn't know when we will get back the rest of the deposit money, and if something happens, it will be very complicated to solve money issue oversea.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for taking the time to write a review, but also to provide some valuable feedback for us, something that is surely appreciated as it helps to better identify the areas in need of improvements. Please let me assure you that we are following up on all your comments while working diligently to keep improving on all our services. Thank you again for your feedback and we look forward to welcome you back in the near future hoping that you would be giving us another chance to redeem ourselves and to once again restore your confidence into our brand.

reviews.negatives: Everything was perfect

reviews.title: A Solid Luxury Stay with a Beautiful City View
reviews.text:
We stayed at The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan for 3 nights in a Deluxe Room with two double beds, and overall it was a refined and comfortable stay.

The room was spacious, clean, and well-appointed, with a lovely city view that made the stay feel more special, especially in the evening. The bed was comfortable, and everything was maintained to a high standard.

Service was consistent and professional throughout—polite, attentive, and in line with what you would expect from the St. Regis brand.

The location is also convenient, making it easy to move around the city and access key areas without much hassle.

If there is one small note, the overall atmosphere leans more towards a calm and understated luxury rather than something vibrant or lively. This may actually be a plus for those who prefer a quieter, more relaxed stay.

Overall, a very solid and reliable choice in Shanghai, offering comfort, good service, and a peaceful environment. We would be happy to stay here again.
reviews.response:
Dear Tjioe,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed and thoughtful review of your recent stay with us. We are delighted to know that you found your Deluxe Room spacious, comfortable and well-appointed and that you especially enjoyed the city views.

It is also wonderful to hear that our team’s service met your expectations and reflected the standards we strive to uphold. Your kind words about our cleanliness, comfort and convenient location are truly appreciated.

We are grateful for your observation regarding the hotel’s calm and understated atmosphere. As you mentioned, this is something many of our guests value for a more relaxing and refined experience and we are pleased it contributed positively to your stay.

Thank you once again for your recommendation. We look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay in the future at your house of Astor

Sincerely, 
Matthieu Bertho
General Manager
The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: During my stay, I accidentally left my bag—containing my passport—in a Didi. As I do not have a Chinese phone number, I was unable to contact the driver myself. An employee named Peter used his own phone to reach the driver and successfully helped me recover my bag. I am incredibly grateful for his help since I I would have struggled to resolve this issue on my own, and losing my passport would have been disastrous. I appreciated the warm service!

reviews.text: I had an excellent stay at this hotel. The staffs were friendly and attentive, ensuring that all my needs were met. I had a great night sleep on the comfortable bed. The location was decent, although not the most central.

Really enjoyed my stay here, the hotel is nice, clean, and comfortable, and the staffs were friendly too.

The location is great not too far from the city center, it’s convenient to get around and find food or things to do.

Overall, great place to stay and definitely recommended
reviews.response:
Dear Wielly,

Thank you very much for your kind review. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay and appreciated the cleanliness, comfort, and friendly service provided by our team.

We’re also glad that our location made it easy for you to explore the city and find great dining options nearby.

Your recommendation truly means a lot to us and we look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit.

Kind regards,
Matthieu Bertho
General Manager
The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan

reviews.title: I recommend it~
reviews.text: I stayed at the St. Regis Hotel with my family, and we had a comfortable time~ When I mentioned it was my mom's birthday, they arranged to prepare fruit and a small cake for us at a scheduled time, and they even folded a towel into an elephant shape~ The staff who attended to us were also very kind^^
reviews.response:
Dear 다람쥐,

Thank you for selecting The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan to celebrate this special occasion with your family.
We are glad to learn that you and your mother enjoyed an unforgettable stay with our team.
It was our great privilege to arrange special birthday preparations for you. Your gracious comments will be proudly shared with our entire staff as a tremendous source of inspiration.
We eagerly anticipate welcoming your family back for many more joyful celebration moments together.

Sincerely,
Matthieu Bertho
General Manager
The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.positives: Very warm welcome by Miguel who took care of everything, earlier and quick check in which was appreciated after a long flight. The room is very comfortable & cosy with the typical St Regis high service quality. Loved the patisserie in the lobby they had such delicious canelle, amazing breakfast.
reviews.negatives: The pool and gym didn't look very high end and not very inviting unfortunately. The cleaning service could be a bit more careful with details (arranging charging cable, organizing items) and not just clean the room. There is a renovation in progress but as long one doesn't sit all day in the lobby, it won't affect anyone that much. Location is okey

reviews.title: Best hospitality
reviews.text:
Great stay. The room was amazing, the city view is spectacular. 
I want to compliment the concierge staff that help me to find halal restaurant and help me to book the Didi to go there. I was unable to search for any halal restaurant because i keep it in my social media and unable to access it. He kindly helped.  He chose the best one for me and i keep going there. Thank you so much for helping me.
reviews.response:
Dear Naimah,

Thank you for sharing your wonderful feedback following your recent stay at The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan. 
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the room and the spectacular city view.
It is especially rewarding to know that our Concierge team provided you with thoughtful and personalized assistance in locating a Halal restaurant and arranging transportation. Your kind recognition of their sincere service is truly appreciated and will be shared with the team as a great encouragement.
We look forward to welcoming you back to the House of Astor in Shanghai.

Sincerely,
Matthieu Bertho
General Manager
The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan

reviews.positives: La habitacion, a pesar que nos tocó exigir que se nos diera la que habíamos reservado porque l persona que nos atendió nos quería dar otra con una vista que no aceptamos.
reviews.negatives: Que estaban en remodelacion y no nos avisaron, que no hablan inglés, que no respetarán las condiciones de nuestra reserva, que para llegar al lobo tuvimos que dar muchas vueltas

reviews.title: Wonderful stay
reviews.text:
Absolutely amazing stay! The room was incredibly spacious, clean, and comfortable. The bathroom was large with a lovely bathtub where you can relax while enjoying the city view. The bed was super comfy, and the view—both day and night—was stunning.

The staff were outstanding, from the valet team to the front desk. Special thanks to Miss Yee at reception, who was so kind and helpful with maps and local directions. Everyone was professional and genuinely welcoming.

The location is peaceful yet conveniently close to shopping and dining spots.

One small note: on the third day, window cleaners unexpectedly descended outside the window. There had been a notice about window cleaning, but it didn’t specify the date or time, so it gave me a bit of a surprise. They were just doing their job and didn’t look inside, but it would be better if the schedule was more specific.

Overall, a truly excellent hotel—I would definitely stay here again!

reviews.negatives: 不要被分配到員工通道旁房型，開關門夠受了

reviews.title: Wonderful experience.! Would definitely return!
reviews.text:
A top class service hotel. My experience has been truly amazing with St. Regis Shanghai. 
The brand speaks for itself. I spent 8 nights at the hotel and everyone in the hotel was respectful, has a great attitude and really took care of every need and detail.
The restaurants were too notch and I basically tried food from each and every one of their restaurants. It is pricey but their service and the warmth experience makes up for the big price tag.

I will definitely stick to the St. Regis brand when travelling in the future.

Kudos to all staff and hotel General Manager.
reviews.response:
Dear valued guest,

Thank you for choosing to stay at St. Regis Shanghai Jingan and sharing your review with us. We do hope to welcome you back when you visit Shanghai next time.

Best Regards,
Hotel Management Team
reviews.room_type: superior deluxe room, guest room, 1 king, city view, high floor

reviews.title: 沒有管家服務
reviews.text: 沒有管家服務，住了三晚。當正常酒店會好d， 行李自己搬。 早餐多選擇。去地鐵大約行10 分鐘。
reviews.response: 尊敬的名流雅士，首先感谢您选择下榻上海静安瑞吉酒店，我们十分重视您的反馈，您的反馈和建议会为您带来更好的瑞吉酒店品牌体验。再次真诚期待您的尊再次光临。
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, Guest room, 2 Double, City view, High floor

reviews.title: 最棒的员工是门口帮忙开车门的老爷爷员工有热忱的接待。走进酒店后都是一群好像被逼营业的工作人员。 jazz bar 很吵。 想好好休息一下可是太吵了。整体感觉很low。
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Staff

reviews.title: 非常極力推薦
reviews.text:
當天是被迫多花一個晚上的費用才來住聖瑞吉的
因覺得有一定的水準
所以選擇   果然沒失望
硬體設施與整潔度沒話說

小提醒
我們是商務旅客，當天定的房型是Premier Deluxe Corner Rm, Guest room, 1 King, City view，AGODA網站預定介面上面可以選擇兩人單人床，但到了現場，此房型並沒有兩人單人床，只有一張KING SIZE的大床，超級尷尬地要與同事睡在一起，管家說，若堅持要兩張，則必須降等…..挖哩@@ 這算是最美中不足的部分吧
reviews.response:
尊敬的宾客，
感谢您选择入住上海静安瑞吉酒店并与我们分享您的入住体验。很高兴收到您对我们的认可及赞扬。我们亦会在今后的工作中继续努力，改善不足，争取带给每一位客人超越预期的入住体验。
再次感谢您的光临，真诚期待不久后的再次相遇。
酒店管理团队

Dear Fan,

Thank you for your kind feedback following your recent stay at The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our excellent service. Your recognition is a wonderful encouragement to our entire team.
We look forward to welcoming you back to your House of Astor in Shanghai soon.

Sincerely,
Matthieu Bertho
General Manager
The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan

reviews.response: 尊敬的賓客，您好！非常感謝您對上海靜安瑞吉酒店的信任並再次選擇入住！希望您壹如既往有壹次愉快的入住體驗，也非常歡迎您為我們留下更多寶貴意見，為您下次的入住帶來更多個性化的體驗。期待在不久的將來，再次迎接您到來上海靜安瑞吉酒店！

reviews.title: 편안
reviews.text: 아늑하고 편안한 분위기의 호텔. 위치도 너무 만족스럽고 직원들도 친절하였음. 단지 호텔 앞 횡단보도는 신호등이 없어서 무서움. 아이 있는 가족보다는 커플에게 적합한 분위기의 비지니스 호텔 또는 커플에게 적합함. 수영장은 너무 수영하는 분위기의 연습용임

reviews.title: 非常愉快的住宿体验

reviews.negatives: 窗外景色非常好，但是窗户有点脏。退押金有点慢。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: אהבתי את מיקום המלון והניקיון . ארוחת בוקר ברמה של 3-4 כוכבים

reviews.title: 好棒的住宿體驗及服務
reviews.text: 饭店位置便利，床非常好睡，管家服务也非常好，我的管家***王芊骄 真的很贴心，能帮我订餐厅、24小时都可以准备茶或咖啡，也有无咖啡因的选择，睡前也可以来杯热牛奶。早餐的选择也很多，住了四天都不会吃腻，很棒。下次到上海还会选择入住。
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, Guest room, 2 Double, City view, High floor

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: ארוחת בוקר טובה , טעימה ומגוונת
reviews.negatives: עקב הטיסה המוקדמת , ביקשתי ארוחת בוקר לדרך . "הארוחה" כללה אגס תפוח ולחמנייה בלי כלום קטנה

reviews.title: 非常優秀
reviews.text:
一抵達門口，立刻有工作人員主動協助搬行李，還提供貼心的管家服務。飯店可提前入住與延後退房，彈性十足。電梯速度極快，等候時間短。整體服務人員非常親切且樂於協助，令人印象深刻。
早餐選擇多樣且豐盛，是一天美好的開始。地理位置也很優越，步行至捷運站僅需 2-3 分鐘，周邊生活機能非常完善。
下次來上海，絕對會再次選擇這間飯店！
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Room, Guest room, 2 Double, City view, High floor

Dear Luminary,
 
Thank you for taking the time to share your wonderful feedback after your recent stay at The St. Regis Shanghai Jingan.

reviews.room_type: superior deluxe room, guest room, 1 king, city view, high floor

reviews.title: 5 звезд!
reviews.positives: Отель выглядит внушительно и буржуазно. Расположение отличное. Роскошный интерьер лобби и номеров. Из окна номера завораживающий вид. Завтрак очень разнообразный. Отличный местный чай Т9.
reviews.negatives: При заезде удерживают депозит 1500 юаней за каждый день пребывания. Возврат произошел лишь спустя 8 дней после выезда. Правильнее было бы делать возврат в тот же день.

reviews.title: Превосходно!
reviews.positives: Все

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Все было супер великолепно! Все нам понравилось, и отель, и завтраки, и сам номер, вид из окна невероятный👍

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Великолепный отель ! Сотрудники , чистота , обслуживание , кухня - все на высшем уровне !

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Очень красивый отель, шикарный вид из окна, разнообразие блюд на завтрак. Персонал всегда помогал вызвать такси. Все было замечательно
reviews.negatives:
Было прохладно, спасал только кондиционер на максимум, на улице был 0 градусов и это считается прохладно для Шанхая. 
Если выключаешь кондиционер, через час в номере становится холодно и приходилось ходить в шерстяной кофте. Но это не минус отеля, просто нужно быть готовым к этому зимой.

reviews.title: Супер!
reviews.positives: Интерьер шикарный ! Очень красивый отель - много картин, красивых больших люстр и композиций , изысканных шкафов. Было все для комфортного проживания.  В номере постоянно убирались. Принадлежности для ванной отличного качества. Завтрак отличный, повара просто супер! Персонал очень доброжелательный , всегда готов прийти на помощь. Понравилось все!
reviews.negatives: Нет ничего , что не понравилось бы.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Κακό πρωινό ! Δεν μιλούσαν αγγλικά . Μας κόλλησε η κάστα για το δωμάτιο 4 φορές σε 3 μέρες .

reviews.title: Прекрасно място за настаняване в Шанхай.
reviews.positives: Обслужване, чистота, удобства, богата закуска, страхотна празнична декорация в лобито.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Herşeyi harika

reviews.title: Kaliteli hizmeti ,lüx sunumları,harika manzarasıyla harika vakit geçirdik.
reviews.positives: Olağanüstü kibar personeli ve kaliteli hizmetiyle mükemmel bir hoteldi.Kendinizi özel hissettiriyorlar.Odamız muhteşem manzaraya sahipti.Harika zaman geçirdik.Çok temiz ve kaliteli ürünleriyle çok konforlu lüx zaman geçirdik.
reviews.negatives: Her şeyi çok güzeldi kötü birşey yoktu.

reviews.title: Bad experience in a very nice hotel
reviews.positives: The hotel is very nice with spectacular decor, and they upgraded our room, which we really appreciated. The views of the skyscrapers are spectacular. The breakfast was excellent, with plenty of variety.
reviews.negatives: The problem was that an e-reader disappeared from our nightstand and was never found. We know it’s not worth much, so it’s really surprising that it was stolen.  The hotel management was very attentive but didn’t resolve the issue or offer any alternative. It’s a shame that this incident spoiled our stay a bit; after what happened, I recommend that all guests keep any valuables in the safe.

reviews.title: Overall, this was a very disappointing experience and not what I would expect from a hotel of this standard.
reviews.positives: The building and suite were overall impressive, but unfortunately, the service was severely lacking throughout our stay.
reviews.negatives:
On the first evening, we discovered that the motorized curtain system was broken and we were unable to open the curtains. I tried calling the front desk several times without success. This is unacceptable, especially for a hotel that advertises a concierge service.

There was no compensation offered. Instead, we were asked in the middle of the night if we wanted to change rooms – which was not an option. Even the following day, after multiple reminders, the issue remained unresolved.

To make matters worse, more than two weeks have passed since our stay, and the security deposit is still blocked on my credit card. I also have yet to receive the invoice, despite explicitly requesting it.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The butler service was alright, but willing to help you out for any request.
reviews.negatives:
There aren't many selection for breakfast.
The staff who helped me checked in wasn't nice...
and one night, I was asking the doorman for direction, he wasn't that helpful...

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The view is astonishing, you get all the beautiful skyline from your room. The room itself is good in size but requires some update at this point. The location of the hotel is great, lot of sights within walking distance, lot of shops and cafes and restaurants
reviews.negatives: The breakfast is so mundane and below St Regis level, and it doesn't change ever, very poor choice, pastries are not fresh, coffee is pathetic. The staff hardly speak any English and it can be extremely difficult to communicate or request anything. The swimming pool in the hotel requires you to bring your own swimming hat, which is totally unacceptable and never heard of in my experience in many hotels around the world. The check in, albeit late at night abd being the only one checking in, was quite long. On top of that the lady at the check in said they need a deposit which was not mentioned when booking the hotel, and she couldn't even provide info when deposit is deposed to be returned to me nor why the amount for deposit was almost the same as the vosy of the stay. Finally, after some discussion she said it is OK not to pay deposit.....no clue what was that all about

reviews.title: An adequate stay but nothing that’ll “wow” you.
reviews.positives: Pretty convenient location with good room views if you choose the right rooms. Our room was spacious enough and comfortable and we enjoyed our time spent in the room generally speaking.
reviews.negatives:
Very limited gym equipment. Fitness centre was quite the letdown and for some reason they turned on the heater. I get that it’s winter but you don’t want the gym to feel like a sauna. 

Conversely, the swimming pool is not heated, which would have been a nice touch if you were coming in from the cold. Furthermore, the swimming pool itself is in poor condition with many tiles at the bottom of the pool having peeled off leading to possible injuries via cuts on the sharp tile edges. 

Lounge options are pretty limited for Asia when it comes to food options, but I guess it’ll suffice for most. Sadly, the lounge itself is situated on the side of the hotel that doesn’t have the great views of the iconic Shanghai skyscrapers. 

The breakfast buffet on the ground floor was generally fine but there could be more variety on the hot Chinese dishes.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location was great, neighbour really easy and nice all close by, best location to stay. Room big and comfortable. Cleaning lady amazing.
reviews.negatives: Shower drain was open and we ask to fix it , nobody did for all days! Spa need refresh! Staff at the spa was no welcome at all, almost rood! Lady at the spa entrance was aggressive !

reviews.title: St Regis disappointing welcome: check-in chaos, delayed room entry,
reviews.positives: Room was clean, room amenities were sufficient, staff were polite.
reviews.negatives: Checked in was slow and frustrating, room wasnt ready even close to 6pm.  We were out the whole day, return at 5pm and the room is not cleaned.  There was no butler service on 36th floor.  The fruits offered to the room were meant to be nice touch, but quality was not great, should have taken more care in plating and fresher produce.

reviews.title: Friendly and warm
reviews.positives: Luxury

reviews.title: Love this hotel and will probably stay here again next time
reviews.positives: The panoramic view spreading from the room to the bathroom was really cool. Loved how big the bathrooms were. Area is perfect too.
reviews.negatives: The room was a bit cold even though we had AC on 24 degrees pretty much the whole time.

reviews.title: Home from
reviews.positives: Second time I am staying here this year. Love the property. Very comfortable.
reviews.negatives: It is away from the main Jing An shopping district.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staffs are keen to assist guests. They are more professional than couple years ago. More selections for breakfast. Great location and view
reviews.negatives: Deco is getting old, bathroom needs update. Doors to bathroom can’t be closed properly. Curtains broken

reviews.title: Good overall
reviews.positives: Location: close to Shanghai natural history museum; close to train station. Bed was comfy, had a good night sleep.
reviews.negatives: Swimming pool at B1, on the way to the pool, air ventilation was not good. Also no direct entry to the pool, but need to enter from changing/shower room, which was unnecessary.

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.positives:

reviews.negatives: -facilities in the room are a bit old

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Location is very good. Short walk to metro 2 and 12. The staff is super polite and attentive. Service is very good. Will stay again in future.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Great
reviews.positives: The luxurious design
reviews.negatives: The lack of choices of food for muslims and staff doesn’t understand English

reviews.title: A pleasant stay
reviews.positives: Clean but slightly old
reviews.negatives:
The deco of the Japanese restaurant is a bit dated. 
The service of the bar isn’t good, some wait staff can barely speak English. And the wine is a bit overpriced.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Heating in hotel in lounge bar is very cold.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The rooms was nice, clean, big and well maintained.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast spread was good, however some of the dishes could be improved.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
I recently had the pleasure of staying at your hotel during my trip to Shanghai, and I wanted to share my experience. Overall, I found the St. Regis Jingan to be one of the most comfortable and welcoming hotels I have ever visited. From the moment I arrived, I was impressed by the elegance of the property and the attentiveness of the staff.

The level of service provided was truly superb. Every member of the team went above and beyond to ensure that my stay was enjoyable and stress-free. Whether it was the front desk, concierge, housekeeping, or dining staff, everyone was exceptionally friendly and professional. Their dedication to guest satisfaction was evident in every interaction.

The room itself was beautifully appointed and provided a luxurious retreat after long days exploring the city. The amenities were top-notch, and I appreciated the attention to detail in everything from the room decor to the in-room services.

However, I must mention that the ongoing renovations during my stay did have an impact on the overall experience. While I understand the necessity of these improvements, the construction noise and temporary adjustments did slightly detract from the otherwise outstanding environment.

Despite this, I thoroughly enjoyed my time at the St. Regis Jingan and would highly recommend it to others. I look forward to returning in the future and experiencing the hotel once the renovations are complete.
reviews.negatives: the ongoing renovation

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great location and staff were friendly and helpful. Breakfast was divine. Room was one of the best I'd ever stayed in and tastefully done with the visitor in mind.

reviews.title: A lovely and elegant hotel
reviews.positives: A wonderful hotel , really elegant and luxury at the heart of Shanghai . We loved the suite as was spacious

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything was fantastic

reviews.positives: yes
reviews.negatives: Nothing just expectional

reviews.title: Very good hotel
reviews.positives: It was very good experience to stay in this hotel. Very professional staff. Thanks a lot for special cake 🎂 to our wedding day celebrating! We do recommend your hotel to our family and the best friends.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: A wonderful stay with stunning Art Deco style and absolutely fabulous food
reviews.positives: I love the art deco and the lovely atmosphere of the tea room and piano
reviews.negatives: I should have stayed longer

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Highly recommend t

reviews.title: Love this hotel and area
reviews.positives: Great value for money. Very spacious rooms and bathroom. Loved the fact that there’s a separate room for suitcases and clothes. It’s so rare that 3 of our big suitcases comfortably fit in the room and aren’t in the way the whole time. Beautiful bathroom with an amazing view. Great area for walking around, exploring, and travelling to any other area.
reviews.negatives: We stayed in 2 different rooms. One of them was a bit cold. The other one was perfect.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Just checked out from the St. Regis Shanghai Jing’an — an absolutely elegant stay from start to finish. ✨ The suite, the skyline views, the signature butler service — everything was impeccable, refined, and effortlessly luxurious. Every detail reminded me why St. Regis stands for timeless hospitality.
reviews.negatives: The only small downside — the staff member at the noodle cooking station could use a refresher in courtesy; otherwise, the service throughout the hotel was flawless.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Comfortable, trendy, 5 star service. My personal concierge Echo Wang王芊骄 was the sweetest and all requests were done in 2 minutes. Loved the free tea service and free daily ironing service.  The made bubble baths for me as well.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Spacious rooms with very attentive staff who would go above and beyond for their guests. Serena was super thoughtful and made extra arrangements without us even asking much! The personal butler service provided definitely makes St Regis stand out from the competitors
reviews.negatives: Nothing!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Location and service was perfect. Especially Echo Wang is extraordinary when it comes to service.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great location. The room and service exceeded my expectations. The staff is very friendly and attentive. The butler service is excellent. I would stay here again next time. Highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Well taken care if by concierge. Laundry, restaurant booking, check-in and check-out all went smoothly. Room was very spacious and well equipped
reviews.negatives: Nothing that I can think of

reviews.title: Exceptional Reception area with extremely welcoming check-in staff, beautiful room with stunning views we highly recomme
reviews.positives: Loved everything about this hotel!
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: 10/10 stay at the St.Regis in Shanghai
reviews.positives:
The hotel exceeded our expectations. The staff was welcoming and very sweet, especially Jolin, who was our designated butler. She was attentive and was ready to help us whenever we needed anything. 
The hotel room was big, comfortable and full of amenities, and the views were spectacular.
We also enjoyed the morning breakfast, which catered to all different tastes and dietary requirements, offering a wide variety of options (the pancakes were one of the best I've ever had).
reviews.negatives: Nothing to complain about- it was perfect.

reviews.title: Nothing to complain
reviews.positives: Our stay at The St. Regis Shanghai was absolutely perfect. Special thanks to Butler Yan, who provided outstanding service — attentive, thoughtful, and made us feel truly at home. The hotel is beautiful, luxurious, and every detail exceeded our expectations. We would love to return!
reviews.negatives: Nil

reviews.negatives: We didn’t like the breakfast. The facility is dark and cold. Coffee station is not comfortable at all and only nespresso coffee which i personally hate.
